title: Internal Controls Policy (Section 101)
summary: This policy establishes the framework, definitions, responsibilities, and basic elements of internal controls for the Diocese of Pensacola-Tallahassee to safeguard financial assets, ensure reliable reporting, and prevent fraud across all diocesan entities.
notes: The document header shows 'Rev 8/14,' and the Summary of Revisions references an effective date of August 2014; no precise day is stated, so the ISO date is approximated as 2014-08-01 with medium confidence. No explicit next review date or review cadence is stated. Retention period is not specified within this governing document itself; as a policy/procedure record it would likely be Permanent under the diocesan Administrative Records rule ('records originating in the organization that document policy, procedure, rules or regulations -> Permanent'), but this is not stated in the text and so retention_period_years is left null. The suggested chapter.section.item of 4.1.1 maps to Financial and Accounting / General in the diocesan taxonomy (chapter 4 = Financial, section 1 = General/Administrative Controls, item 1 = Internal Controls Policy); this is a best-judgment mapping. The document references five appendices (15–19) covering Political Activity, Code of Business Conduct, Conflict of Interest, Fraud Policy, and Whistleblower Policy — each of these may warrant separate metadata records. Section numbering in the document contains an apparent inconsistency: subsections 101.5.2–101.5.4 are labeled '105.1.2'–'105.1.4' in the body text, likely a typographical error.
